/* できごと */
revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月6日'''（きゅうれきごがつむいか）は[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[慶長]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1607年]][[6月29日]]） - [[朝鮮]]使節が初めて[[江戸]]を訪問 * [[慶応]]元年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[6月28日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]が[[長州藩]]の[[木戸孝允|桂小五郎]]と会談し[[薩長連合]]が始動
== 誕生日 == * [[応保]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1162年]][[6月20日]]） - [[辨長]]、[[浄土宗]]の僧（+ [[1238年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[舒明天皇]]7年（ユリウス暦[[635年]][[5月27日]]） - [[李淵]]（高祖）、[[唐]]の初代皇帝（* [[566年]]） * [[天平宝字]]7年（ユリウス暦[[763年]][[6月21日]]） - [[鑑真]]、唐の大和尚・日本律宗の開祖（* [[688年]]） * [[応永]]15年（ユリウス暦[[1408年]][[5月31日]]） - [[足利義満]]、[[室町幕府]]3代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1358年]]） * [[慶長]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1612年]][[6月5日]]） - [[有馬晴信]]、[[キリシタン大名]]（* [[1567年]]） * [[元禄]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1694年]][[5月29日]]） - [[三井高利]]、豪商・[[三井家]]の祖（* [[1622年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506}}
[[ko:음력 5월 6일]] [[zh:五月初六]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月6日'''（きゅうれきごがつむいか）は[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[慶長]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1607年]][[6月29日]]） - [[朝鮮]]使節が初めて[[江戸]]を訪問{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * [[慶応]]元年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[6月28日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]が[[長州藩]]の[[木戸孝允|桂小五郎]]と会談し[[薩長同盟|薩長連合]]が始動{{要出典|date=2021-04}}
== 誕生日 == * [[承和_(日本)|承和]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[835年]][[6月5日]]） - [[平良広]]{{要出典|date=2021-02}}、[[平高望]]の四男で[[平氏#桓武平氏|桓武平氏高望流]]の1人（+ [[928年]]） * [[応保]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1162年]][[6月20日]]） - [[弁長]]、[[浄土宗]]の僧（+ [[1238年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[舒明天皇]]7年（ユリウス暦[[635年]][[5月27日]]） - [[李淵]]（高祖）、[[唐]]の初代皇帝（* [[566年]]） * [[天平宝字]]7年（ユリウス暦[[763年]][[6月21日]]） - [[鑑真]]、唐の大和尚・日本律宗の開祖（* [[688年]]） * [[応永]]15年（ユリウス暦[[1408年]][[5月31日]]） - [[足利義満]]、[[室町幕府]]3代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1358年]]） * [[天正]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1587年]][[6月11日]]） - [[大友義鎮|大友宗麟]]、[[豊後]]の[[戦国大名]]（* [[1530年]]） * [[慶長]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1612年]][[6月5日]]） - [[有馬晴信]]、[[キリシタン大名]]（* [[1567年]]） * [[元禄]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1694年]][[5月29日]]） - [[三井高利]]、豪商・[[三井家]]の祖（* [[1622年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月6日'''（きゅうれきごがつむいか）は[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[慶長]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1607年]][[6月29日]]） - [[朝鮮]]使節が初めて[[江戸]]を訪問{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * [[慶応]]元年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[6月28日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]が[[長州藩]]の[[木戸孝允|桂小五郎]]と会談し[[薩長同盟|薩長連合]]が始動{{要出典|date=2021-04}}
== 誕生日 == * [[承和_(日本)|承和]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[835年]][[6月5日]]） - [[平良広]]{{要出典|date=2021-02}}、[[平高望]]の四男で[[平氏#桓武平氏|桓武平氏高望流]]の1人（+ [[928年]]） * [[応保]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1162年]][[6月20日]]） - [[弁長]]、[[浄土宗]]の僧（+ [[1238年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[舒明天皇]]7年（ユリウス暦[[635年]][[5月27日]]） - [[李淵]]（高祖）、[[唐]]の初代皇帝（* [[566年]]） * [[天平宝字]]7年（ユリウス暦[[763年]][[6月21日]]） - [[鑑真]]、唐の大和尚・日本律宗の開祖（* [[688年]]） * [[応永]]15年（ユリウス暦[[1408年]][[5月31日]]） - [[足利義満]]、[[室町幕府]]3代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1358年]]） * [[天正]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1587年]][[6月11日]]） - [[大友義鎮|大友宗麟]]、[[豊後]]の[[戦国大名]]（* [[1530年]]） * [[慶長]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1612年]][[6月5日]]） - [[有馬晴信]]、[[キリシタン大名]]（* [[1567年]]） * [[元禄]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1694年]][[5月29日]]） - [[三井高利]]、豪商・[[三井家]]の祖（* [[1622年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

== 忌日 == * [[舒明天皇]]7年（ユリウス暦[[635年]][[5月27日]]） - [[李淵]]（高祖）、[[唐]]の初代皇帝（* [[566年]]） * [[天平宝字]]7年（ユリウス暦[[763年]][[6月21日]]） - [[鑑真]]、唐の大和尚・日本律宗の開祖（* [[688年]]） * [[応永]]15年（ユリウス暦[[1408年]][[5月31日]]） - [[足利義満]]、[[室町幕府]]3代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1358年]]） * [[天正]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1587年]][[6月11日]]） - [[大友義鎮|大友宗麟]]、[[豊後]]の[[戦国大名]]（* [[1530年]]） * [[慶長]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1612年]][[6月5日]]） - [[有馬晴信]]、[[キリシタン大名]]（* [[1567年]]） * [[元禄]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1694年]][[5月29日]]） - [[三井高利]]、豪商・[[三井家]]の祖（* [[1622年]]）

[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:旧暦May]][[sn:May 6日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages needing attribution]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月6日'''（きゅうれきごがつむいか）は[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[慶長]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1607年]][[6月29日]]） - [[朝鮮]]使節が初めて[[江戸]]を訪問{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * [[慶応]]元年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[6月28日]]） - [[坂本龍馬]]が[[長州藩]]の[[木戸孝允|桂小五郎]]と会談し[[薩長同盟|薩長連合]]が始動{{要出典|date=2021-04}}
== 誕生日 == * [[承和_(日本)|承和]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[835年]][[6月5日]]） - [[平良広]]{{要出典|date=2021-02}}、[[平高望]]の四男で[[平氏#桓武平氏|桓武平氏高望流]]の1人（+ [[928年]]） * [[応保]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1162年]][[6月20日]]） - [[弁長]]、[[浄土宗]]の僧（+ [[1238年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[舒明天皇]]7年（ユリウス暦[[635年]][[5月27日]]） - [[李淵]]（高祖）、[[唐]]の初代皇帝（* [[566年]]） * [[天平宝字]]7年（ユリウス暦[[763年]][[6月21日]]） - [[鑑真]]、唐の大和尚・日本律宗の開祖（* [[688年]]） * [[応永]]15年（ユリウス暦[[1408年]][[5月31日]]） - [[足利義満]]、[[室町幕府]]3代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1358年]]） * [[天正]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1587年]][[6月11日]]） - [[大友義鎮|大友宗麟]]、[[豊後]]の[[戦国大名]]（* [[1530年]]） * [[慶長]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1612年]][[6月5日]]） - [[有馬晴信]]、[[キリシタン大名]]（* [[1567年]]） * [[元禄]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1694年]][[5月29日]]） - [[三井高利]]、豪商・[[三井家]]の祖（* [[1622年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:旧暦May]][[sn:May 6日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

Removing from [[Category:Or similar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding korean to all the dates
Text replacement - "[[ja:M" to "[[sn:"
Text replacement - "年]]" to "]]"
Text replacement - "元年" to "1st year"
Text replacement - "[[ユリウス暦]]" to "[[Julian Calendar]]"
Text replacement - "[[グレゴリオ暦]]" to "[[Gregorian Calendar]]"
removing some junk and restandardizing the references section and template
Text replacement - "2年（" to "2nd year（"
Text replacement - "5年（" to "5th year（"
Text replacement - "7年（" to "7th year（"
Removing from [[Category:U]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
translating this common phrase in them
mass translating year names
attempting a full on mass replacement of all the era names
fixing the spacing and capitalization
replacements I missed

revision.text:
[[sn:May 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 6일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]] [[zh:五月初六]] [[en:draft:May 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1607]] [[6月29日]] ） - [[朝鮮]] 使節が初めて[[江戸]] を訪問{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[6月28日]] ） - [[坂本龍馬]] が[[長州藩]] の[[木戸孝允|桂小五郎]] と会談し[[薩長同盟|薩長連合]] が始動{{要出典|date=2021-04}}
== Births == * [[承和_(日本)|承和]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[6月5日]] ） - [[平良広]] {{要出典|date=2021-02}} 、[[平高望]] の四男で[[平氏#桓武平氏|桓武平氏高望流]] の1人（+ [[928]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[6月20日]] ） - [[弁長]] 、[[浄土宗]] の僧（+ [[1238]] ）
== Deaths == * [[舒明天皇]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[635]] [[5月27日]] ） - [[李淵]] （高祖）、[[唐]] の初代皇帝（* [[566]] ） * [[Tenpyō宝字]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[763]] [[6月21日]] ） - [[鑑真]] 、唐の大和尚・日本律宗の開祖（* [[688]] ） * [[Ōei]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1408]] [[5月31日]] ） - [[足利義満]] 、[[室町幕府]] 3代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1358]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[6月11日]] ） - [[大友義鎮|大友宗麟]] 、[[豊後]] の[[戦国大名]] （* [[1530]] ） * [[Keichō]] 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[6月5日]] ） - [[有馬晴信]] 、[[キリシタン大名]] （* [[1567]] ） * [[Genroku]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1694]] [[5月29日]] ） - [[三井高利]] 、豪商・[[三井家]] の祖（* [[1622]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1607]] [[6月29日]] ） - [[朝鮮]] 使節が初めて[[江戸]] を訪問{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[6月28日]] ） - [[坂本龍馬]] が[[長州藩]] の[[木戸孝允|桂小五郎]] と会談し[[薩長同盟|薩長連合]] が始動{{要出典|date=2021-04}}
== Births == * [[承和_(日本)|承和]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[6月5日]] ） - [[平良広]] {{要出典|date=2021-02}} 、[[平高望]] の四男で[[平氏#桓武平氏|桓武平氏高望流]] の1人（+ [[928]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[6月20日]] ） - [[弁長]] 、[[浄土宗]] の僧（+ [[1238]] ）
== Deaths == * [[舒明天皇]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[635]] [[5月27日]] ） - [[李淵]] （高祖）、[[唐]] の初代皇帝（* [[566]] ） * [[Tenpyō宝字]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[763]] [[6月21日]] ） - [[鑑真]] 、唐の大和尚・日本律宗の開祖（* [[688]] ） * [[Ōei]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1408]] [[5月31日]] ） - [[足利義満]] 、[[室町幕府]] 3代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1358]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[6月11日]] ） - [[大友義鎮|大友宗麟]] 、[[豊後]] の[[戦国大名]] （* [[1530]] ） * [[Keichō]] 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[6月5日]] ） - [[有馬晴信]] 、[[キリシタン大名]] （* [[1567]] ） * [[Genroku]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1694]] [[5月29日]] ） - [[三井高利]] 、豪商・[[三井家]] の祖（* [[1622]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 6일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]] [[zh:五月初六]] [[en:draft:May 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1607]] [[June 29]] ） - [[朝鮮]] 使節が初めて[[江戸]] を訪問{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 28]] ） - [[坂本龍馬]] が[[長州藩]] の[[木戸孝允|桂小五郎]] と会談し[[薩長同盟|薩長連合]] が始動{{要出典|date=2021-04}}
== Births == * [[承和_(日本)|承和]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[June 5]] ） - [[平良広]] {{要出典|date=2021-02}} 、[[平高望]] の四男で[[平氏#桓武平氏|桓武平氏高望流]] の1人（+ [[928]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[June 20]] ） - [[弁長]] 、[[浄土宗]] の僧（+ [[1238]] ）
== Deaths == * [[舒明天皇]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[635]] [[May 27]] ） - [[李淵]] （高祖）、[[唐]] の初代皇帝（* [[566]] ） * [[Tenpyō宝字]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[763]] [[June 21]] ） - [[鑑真]] 、唐の大和尚・日本律宗の開祖（* [[688]] ） * [[Ōei]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1408]] [[May 31]] ） - [[足利義満]] 、[[室町幕府]] 3代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1358]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 11]] ） - [[大友義鎮|大友宗麟]] 、[[豊後]] の[[戦国大名]] （* [[1530]] ） * [[Keichō]] 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[June 5]] ） - [[有馬晴信]] 、[[キリシタン大名]] （* [[1567]] ） * [[Genroku]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1694]] [[May 29]] ） - [[三井高利]] 、豪商・[[三井家]] の祖（* [[1622]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[戦国大名]]" to "{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 6일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]] [[zh:五月初六]] [[en:draft:May 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1607]] [[June 29]] ） - [[朝鮮]] 使節が初めて[[江戸]] を訪問{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 28]] ） - [[坂本龍馬]] が[[Chōshū Domain]] の[[木戸孝允|桂小五郎]] と会談し[[薩長同盟|薩長連合]] が始動{{要出典|date=2021-04}}
== Births == * [[承和_(日本)|承和]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[June 5]] ） - [[平良広]] {{要出典|date=2021-02}} 、[[平高望]] の四男で[[平氏#桓武平氏|桓武平氏高望流]] の1人（+ [[928]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[June 20]] ） - [[弁長]] 、[[浄土宗]] の僧（+ [[1238]] ）
== Deaths == * [[舒明天皇]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[635]] [[May 27]] ） - [[李淵]] （高祖）、[[唐]] の初代皇帝（* [[566]] ） * [[Tenpyō宝字]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[763]] [[June 21]] ） - [[鑑真]] 、唐の大和尚・日本律宗の開祖（* [[688]] ） * [[Ōei]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1408]] [[May 31]] ） - [[足利義満]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 3代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1358]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 11]] ） - [[大友義鎮|大友宗麟]] 、[[豊後]] の{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1530]] ） * [[Keichō]] 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[June 5]] ） - [[有馬晴信]] 、[[キリシタン大名]] （* [[1567]] ） * [[Genroku]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1694]] [[May 29]] ） - [[三井高利]] 、豪商・[[三井家]] の祖（* [[1622]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506}}

== Deaths == * [[Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[635]] [[May 27]] ） - [[李淵]] （高祖）、[[唐]] の初代皇帝（* [[566]] ） * [[Tenpyō宝字]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[763]] [[June 21]] ） - [[鑑真]] 、唐の大和尚・日本律宗の開祖（* [[688]] ） * [[Ōei]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1408]] [[May 31]] ） - [[足利義満]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 3代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1358]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 11]] ） - [[大友義鎮|大友宗麟]] 、[[豊後]] の{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1530]] ） * [[Keichō]] 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[June 5]] ） - [[有馬晴信]] 、[[キリシタン大名]] （* [[1567]] ） * [[Genroku]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1694]] [[May 29]] ） - [[三井高利]] 、豪商・[[三井家]] の祖（* [[1622]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1607]] [[June 29]] ） - [[朝鮮]] 使節が初めて[[江戸]] を訪問{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 28]] ） - [[Sakamoto Ryōma]] が[[Chōshū Domain]] の[[木戸孝允|桂小五郎]] と会談し[[薩長同盟|薩長連合]] が始動{{要出典|date=2021-04}}
== Births == * [[承和_(日本)|承和]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[June 5]] ） - [[平良広]] {{要出典|date=2021-02}} 、[[平高望]] の四男で[[Taira Clan#桓武Taira Clan|桓武Taira Clan高望流]] の1人（+ [[928]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[June 20]] ） - [[弁長]] 、[[Jōdo-shū]] のMonk（+ [[1238]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[635]] [[May 27]] ） - [[李淵]] （高祖）、[[唐]] の初代Emperor（* [[566]] ） * [[Tenpyō宝字]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[763]] [[June 21]] ） - [[鑑真]] 、唐の大和尚・日本律宗の開祖（* [[688]] ） * [[Ōei]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1408]] [[May 31]] ） - [[足利義満]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 3代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1358]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 11]] ） - [[Otomo Yoshinobu|大友宗麟]] 、[[豊後]] の{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1530]] ） * [[Keichō]] 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[June 5]] ） - [[有馬晴信]] 、[[Christian Daimyō]] （* [[1567]] ） * [[Genroku]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1694]] [[May 29]] ） - [[三井高利]] 、豪商・[[三井家]] の祖（* [[1622]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .

== Deaths == * [[Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[635]] [[May 27]] ） - [[李淵]] （高祖）、[[唐]] の初代Emperor（* [[566]] ） * [[Tenpyō宝字]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[763]] [[June 21]] ） - [[鑑真]] 、唐の大和尚・日本律宗の開祖（* [[688]] ） * [[Ōei]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1408]] [[May 31]] ） - [[足利義満]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 3代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1358]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 11]] ） - [[Otomo Yoshinobu|大友宗麟]] 、[[豊後]] の{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1530]] ） * [[Keichō]] 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[June 5]] ） - [[有馬晴信]] 、[[Christian Daimyō]] （* [[1567]] ） * [[Genroku]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1694]] [[May 29]] ） - [[三井高利]] 、豪商・[[三井家]] の祖（* [[1622]] ） == See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:May 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 6일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]] [[zh:五月初六]] [[en:draft:May 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 12nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1607]] [[June 29]] ） - [[朝鮮]] 使節が初めて[[江戸]] を訪問{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[June 28]] ） - [[Sakamoto Ryōma]] が[[Chōshū Domain]] の[[木戸孝允|桂小五郎]] と会談し[[薩長同盟|薩長連合]] が始動{{要出典|date=2021-04}}
== Births == * [[承和_(日本)|承和]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[835]] [[June 5]] ） - [[平良広]] {{要出典|date=2021-02}} 、[[平高望]] の四男で[[Taira Clan#桓武Taira Clan|桓武Taira Clan高望流]] の1人（+ [[928]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[June 20]] ） - [[弁長]] 、[[Jōdo-shū]] のMonk（+ [[1238]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[635]] [[May 27]] ） - [[李淵]] （高祖）、[[唐]] の初代Emperor（* [[566]] ） * [[Tenpyō-hōji]] 7th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[763]] [[June 21]] ） - [[鑑真]] 、唐の大和尚・日本律宗の開祖（* [[688]] ） * [[Ōei]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1408]] [[May 31]] ） - [[足利義満]] 、[[Ashikaga Shogunate]] 3代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]] （* [[1358]] ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1587]] [[June 11]] ） - [[Otomo Yoshinobu|大友宗麟]] 、[[豊後]] の{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （* [[1530]] ） * [[Keichō]] 17th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1612]] [[June 5]] ） - [[有馬晴信]] 、[[Christian Daimyō]] （* [[1567]] ） * [[Genroku]] 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1694]] [[May 29]] ） - [[三井高利]] 、豪商・[[三井家]] の祖（* [[1622]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1607]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日}}) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04}}</ref> * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1865]] {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日}}) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04}}</ref>
== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[835]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日}}) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[928]]). * [[応保]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1162]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}}) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[635]] {{ill|May 27|ja|5月27日}}) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[566]]). * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|天平宝字}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[763]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}}) – the great monk {{ill|Ganjin|ja|鑑真}}, a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[688]]). * [[Ōei]] 15th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1408]] {{ill|May 31|ja|5月31日}}) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[1358]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1587]] {{ill|June 11|ja|6月11日}}) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[1530]]). * [[Keichō]] 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1612]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日}}) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[1567]]). * [[Genroku]] 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1694]] {{ill|May 29|ja|5月29日}}) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[1622]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[835]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日}}) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[928]]). * [[応保]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1162]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日}}) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[635]] {{ill|May 27|ja|5月27日}}) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[566]]). * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|天平宝字}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[763]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}}) – the great monk {{ill|Ganjin|ja|鑑真}}, a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[688]]). * [[Ōei]] 15th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1408]] {{ill|May 31|ja|5月31日}}) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[1358]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1587]] {{ill|June 11|ja|6月11日}}) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[1530]]). * [[Keichō]] 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1612]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日}}) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[1567]]). * [[Genroku]] 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1694]] {{ill|May 29|ja|5月29日}}) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[1622]]).

revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1607]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日|12=draft}}) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04}}</ref> * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1865]] {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日|12=draft}}) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04}}</ref>
== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[835]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|12=draft}}) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[928]]). * [[応保]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1162]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft}}) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[635]] {{ill|May 27|ja|5月27日|12=draft}}) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[566]]). * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|天平宝字|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[763]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|12=draft}}) – the great monk {{ill|Ganjin|ja|鑑真|12=draft}}, a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[688]]). * [[Ōei]] 15th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1408]] {{ill|May 31|ja|5月31日|12=draft}}) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[1358]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1587]] {{ill|June 11|ja|6月11日|12=draft}}) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[1530]]). * [[Keichō]] 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1612]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|12=draft}}) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[1567]]). * [[Genroku]] 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1694]] {{ill|May 29|ja|5月29日|12=draft}}) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[1622]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar May]] [[Category:Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 6 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:May 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 6일]] [[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月初六]] [[en:draft:May 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:May 6日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:ay 6 (Lunisolar)]]

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1607]] {{ill|June 29|ja|6月29日|12=draft}}) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04}}</ref> * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1865]] {{ill|June 28|ja|6月28日|12=draft}}) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04}}</ref>
== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[835]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|12=draft}}) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[928]]). * [[応保]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1162]] {{ill|June 20|ja|6月20日|12=draft}}) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[635]] {{ill|May 27|ja|5月27日|12=draft}}) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[566]]). * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|ja|天平宝字|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[763]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|12=draft}}) – the great monk {{ill|Ganjin|ja|鑑真|12=draft}}, a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[688]]). * [[Ōei]] 15th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1408]] {{ill|May 31|ja|5月31日|12=draft}}) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[1358]]). * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1587]] {{ill|June 11|ja|6月11日|12=draft}}) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[1530]]). * [[Keichō]] 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1612]] {{ill|June 5|ja|6月5日|12=draft}}) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[1567]]). * [[Genroku]] 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1694]] {{ill|May 29|ja|5月29日|12=draft}}) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[1622]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839503]] Wikidata name: 6th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 6|qq=May 6}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref>

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref>
== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[:en:928|928]]). * [[:en:応保|応保]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[:en:1238|1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:635|635]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[:en:566|566]]). * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:763|763]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – the great monk [[:en:Jianzhen|Ganjin]], a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[:en:688|688]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1408|1408]] [[:en:May 31|May 31]]) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1358|1358]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[:en:1622|1622]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506|qq=}}

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初六]] {{wikidata link|Q839503}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Matching pagename on wikidata]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初六]][[zh:五月初六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839503]] Wikidata name: 6th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 6|qq=May 6}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref>
== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[:en:928|928]]). * [[:en:応保|応保]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[:en:1238|1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:635|635]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[:en:566|566]]). * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:763|763]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – the great monk [[:en:Jianzhen|Ganjin]], a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[:en:688|688]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1408|1408]] [[:en:May 31|May 31]]) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1358|1358]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[:en:1622|1622]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:635|635]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[:en:566|566]]). * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:763|763]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – the great monk [[:en:Jianzhen|Ganjin]], a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[:en:688|688]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1408|1408]] [[:en:May 31|May 31]]) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1358|1358]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[:en:1622|1622]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref>
== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[:en:928|928]]). * [[:en:応保|応保]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[:en:1238|1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:635|635]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[:en:566|566]]). * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:763|763]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – the great monk [[:en:Jianzhen|Ganjin]], a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[:en:688|688]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1408|1408]] [[:en:May 31|May 31]]) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1358|1358]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[:en:1622|1622]]).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|Q1}}" to ""
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初六]][[zh:五月初六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839503]] Wikidata name: 6th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 6|qq=May 6}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref>
== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[:en:928|928]]). * [[:en:応保|応保]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[:en:1238|1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:635|635]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[:en:566|566]]). * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:763|763]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – the great monk [[:en:Jianzhen|Ganjin]], a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[:en:688|688]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1408|1408]] [[:en:May 31|May 31]]) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1358|1358]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[:en:1622|1622]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初六]][[zh:五月初六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839503]] Wikidata name: 6th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 6|qq=May 6}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref>
== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[:en:928|928]]). * [[:en:応保|応保]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[:en:1238|1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:635|635]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[:en:566|566]]). * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:763|763]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – the great monk [[:en:Jianzhen|Ganjin]], a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[:en:688|688]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1408|1408]] [[:en:May 31|May 31]]) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1358|1358]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[:en:1622|1622]]).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:635|635]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[:en:566|566]]). * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:763|763]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – the great monk [[:en:Jianzhen|Ganjin]], a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[:en:688|688]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1408|1408]] [[:en:May 31|May 31]]) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1358|1358]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[:en:1622|1622]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref>
== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[:en:928|928]]). * [[:en:応保|応保]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[:en:1238|1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:635|635]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[:en:566|566]]). * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:763|763]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – the great monk [[:en:Jianzhen|Ganjin]], a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[:en:688|688]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1408|1408]] [[:en:May 31|May 31]]) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1358|1358]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[:en:1622|1622]]).

revision.comment: Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 6일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初六]][[zh:五月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 6일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初六]][[zh:五月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初六]][[zh:五月初六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839503]] Wikidata name: 6th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 6|qq=May 6}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref>
== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[:en:928|928]]). * [[:en:応保|応保]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[:en:1238|1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:635|635]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[:en:566|566]]). * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:763|763]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – the great monk [[:en:Jianzhen|Ganjin]], a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[:en:688|688]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1408|1408]] [[:en:May 31|May 31]]) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1358|1358]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[:en:1622|1622]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref>
== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[:en:928|928]]). * [[:en:応保|応保]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[:en:1238|1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:635|635]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[:en:566|566]]). * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:763|763]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – the great monk [[:en:Jianzhen|Ganjin]], a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[:en:688|688]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1408|1408]] [[:en:May 31|May 31]]) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1358|1358]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[:en:1622|1622]]).

== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[:en:928|928]]). * [[:en:応保|応保]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[:en:1238|1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:635|635]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[:en:566|566]]). * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:763|763]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – the great monk [[:en:Jianzhen|Ganjin]], a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[:en:688|688]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1408|1408]] [[:en:May 31|May 31]]) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1358|1358]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[:en:1622|1622]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref>
== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[:en:928|928]]). * [[:en:応保|応保]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[:en:1238|1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:635|635]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[:en:566|566]]). * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:763|763]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – the great monk [[:en:Jianzhen|Ganjin]], a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[:en:688|688]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1408|1408]] [[:en:May 31|May 31]]) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1358|1358]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[:en:1622|1622]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506|qq=}}

== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 6일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初六]][[zh:五月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 6일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初六]][[zh:五月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初六]][[zh:五月初六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839503]] Wikidata name: 6th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 6|qq=May 6}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1607|1607]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref>
== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:835|835]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died [[:en:928|928]]). * [[:en:応保|応保]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died [[:en:1238|1238]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:635|635]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born [[:en:566|566]]). * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 7th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:763|763]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – the great monk [[:en:Jianzhen|Ganjin]], a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born [[:en:688|688]]). * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1408|1408]] [[:en:May 31|May 31]]) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born [[:en:1358|1358]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 15th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1587|1587]] [[:en:June 11|June 11]]) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born [[:en:1530|1530]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 17th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1612|1612]] [[:en:June 5|June 5]]) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1567|1567]]). * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1694|1694]] [[:en:May 29|May 29]]) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born [[:en:1622|1622]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506|qq=}}

revision.comment: v25: Convert interwiki links [[:en:...]] to {{ill}} templates
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初六]][[zh:五月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初六]][[zh:五月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初六]][[zh:五月初六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839503]] Wikidata name: 6th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 6|qq=May 6}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1607|en|1607|WD=Q6756|lt=1607}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – A Korean envoy visited Edo for the first time.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|June 28|en|June 28|WD=Q2660|lt=June 28}}) – Under the mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma, negotiations with the Chōshū Domain led to the initial formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref>
== Births == * [[承和 (日本)|Shōwa]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|835|en|835|WD=Q23894|lt=835}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5}}) – Heira Hiro, one of the four sons of Hira Takamochi of the Kantō Taira clan (died {{ill|928|en|928|WD=Q24297|lt=928}}). * [[:en:応保|応保]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1162|en|1162|WD=Q19667|lt=1162}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20}}) – Benchō, a monk of the Jōdo-shū (died {{ill|1238|en|1238|WD=Q5433|lt=1238}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Jomei|en|Emperor Jomei|WD=Q329761|lt=Emperor Jomei}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|635|en|635|WD=Q31779|lt=635}} {{ill|May 27|en|May 27|WD=Q2587|lt=May 27}}) – Emperor Jomei, the first emperor of the Tang dynasty of Japan (also known as Li Yuan, the founding emperor of the Tang in China; born {{ill|566|en|566|WD=Q32609|lt=566}}). * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|WD=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|763|en|763|WD=Q30692|lt=763}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21}}) – the great monk {{ill|Jianzhen|en|Jianzhen|WD=Q714061|lt=Ganjin}}, a prominent Chinese Buddhist monk who founded the Japanese Ritsu school (born {{ill|688|en|688|WD=Q30443|lt=688}}). * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei}} 15th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1408|en|1408|WD=Q6138|lt=1408}} {{ill|May 31|en|May 31|WD=Q2591|lt=May 31}}) – Ashikaga Yoshimitsu, the 3rd shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1358|en|1358|WD=Q6140|lt=1358}}). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1587|en|1587|WD=Q6744|lt=1587}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|WD=Q2617|lt=June 11}}) – Otomo Sōrin, a Sengoku daimyō of Bungo (born {{ill|1530|en|1530|WD=Q6429|lt=1530}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 17th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1612|en|1612|WD=Q6771|lt=1612}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|WD=Q2622|lt=June 5}}) – Arima Harunobu, a Christian daimyō (born {{ill|1567|en|1567|WD=Q6642|lt=1567}}). * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|WD=Q1325001|lt=Genroku}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1694|en|1694|WD=Q7694|lt=1694}} {{ill|May 29|en|May 29|WD=Q2589|lt=May 29}}) – Mitsui Takatoshi, the progenitor of the Mitsui family, a prominent merchant (born {{ill|1622|en|1622|WD=Q6815|lt=1622}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|5|5|7|4|6|6|5|0506|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|5月6日 (旧暦)|version=84595597|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:May 6 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 5월 6일]] [[ja:5月6日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月初六]]
